Manufacturing practices
Through membership in Leather Working Group, brands commit to supporting its work of setting globally recognized environmental standards for leather manufacturing.
As certified by
Leather Working Group
Learn more about Leather Working Group

Leather Working Group

Leather Working Group is a not-for-profit multi-stakeholder organization committed to reducing the environmental impact of leather manufacturing. It sets the LWG Standards of environmental criteria against which leather manufacturers are independently audited and certified. A product highlighting Leather Working Group means the brand can verify all the leather used in that product comes from an LWG-certified facility.
Discover more products with sustainability features. Learn more
